title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Shroff Eye Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
